text: Every single triangle is a polygon. Anything that is a triangle is also a geometric shape with three sides. A portion of geometric shapes with three sides are not polygons.

premise1.subject: triangle
premise1.raw_text: Every single triangle is a polygon

conclusion.raw_text: A portion of geometric shapes with three sides are not polygons
